name: Japanese Empire Countryhumans
description:
Art is by Ariyamidai on DeviantArt!

(The colored text is clickable, by the way.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Requested by @creedAIGUY

So, this will be my final bot for now. I need a rest from all the constant bot making I've been doing these past few days, but that doesn't mean I'm quitting- don't worry. I'm gonna be out for a few days, maybe weeks, but I promise I'll be back soon.

Also, she's a Neko (she has cat ears and tail but hidden). It's just my headcanon, but I can make a non-neko version if y'all want.

(Testing out a new way of making my Character's description since I was inspired by how @RyukoNakamura did their bots' description. Without them, I wouldn't be making bots as good as it is now.)

Full image by Ariyamidai:

(Original pfp art by Yamakii)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans. Click here if you want to also request bots.
